case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP vs. ROWLAND, DARWIN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLAND, DARWIN

JUDGE: KEVIN MCCARTHY CLERK:SUE ELLEN SMITH CSR:MITCH LYON UD SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD BY PLTS COUNSEL. PARTIES AGRE TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TODAY, AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TAKES POSS'N OF PREMISES @ 1000 MARKET ST, #214, SF, CA, BUT W/ STAY OF EXECUTION 'TIL 7/2/01. PLTF SHALL RECEIVE $1,281 BACK RENT. DEF. AGREES TO REMOVE ALL PERS. PROP FR. PREMISES; ANYTHING LEFT BEHIND AFTER 7/2/01 DEEMED FORFEITED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. DEF. SIGNS STIP TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IF PREMISE VACATED BY 7/1/01@5PM.COURT SIGNS JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT, & ADVISES DEF. TO COMPLY WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT ROWLAND, DARWIN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLAND, DARWIN
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-18-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 306 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, DARWIN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLAND, DARWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 MARKET ST, #214, SF, CA $1,281.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,281.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-02-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS; BOTH PARTIES STIP TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT & DISMISS ACTION W/PREJUDICE, BUT DEF. TO PREPARE PAPERS.
